---
name: Workflow Health Check Finding
about: Finding from a Skill Forge workflow run (usually auto-generated by the agent)
title: '[health-check] '
labels: 'health-check, workflow-improvement'
assignees: ''
---

## Workflow
<!-- Which workflow (e.g. skf-create-skill, skf-test-skill) -->


## Step File
<!-- Exact path to the step file where the issue occurred -->
`src/skf-{workflow}/references/step-NN-name.md`

## Severity
<!-- Pick one: `bug` | `friction` | `gap`
     bug      = instructions were wrong or contradictory
     friction = instructions worked but caused back-and-forth or guessing
     gap      = a scenario arose that wasn't covered at all -->


## Fingerprint
<!-- Deterministic dedup key: first 7 hex chars of sha1("severity|workflow|step_file|section-slug").
     Auto-generated by the health-check workflow and also applied as an `fp-XXXXXXX` label.
     If you are filing this manually, compute it from the tuple above and include it here AND as a label;
     the dedup Action will link your report to any existing canonical issue. -->
`fp-XXXXXXX`


## Finding
<!-- ONE sentence. What is the problem? Do not explain why yet. -->


## Expected
<!-- ONE sentence. What did the step instruct or imply should happen? -->


## Actual
<!-- ONE sentence. What did you observe instead? -->


## Evidence
<!-- 2-5 bulleted `file:line` citations. Quote the exact text. No narrative. -->
- `path/to/file.md:NN` — "quoted text"
-

## Impact
<!-- ONE sentence. What did this cost in this session? -->


## Suggested Fix
<!-- ONE recommended change. 1-3 sentences. Do NOT list multiple options here. -->


<details>
<summary>Alternatives considered (optional)</summary>

<!-- Only fill this if you seriously considered 2+ approaches. Keep under 100 words. -->

</details>

## Environment
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Date |  |
| OS |  |
| AI Editor |  |
| Model |  |
| Forge Tier |  |
| SKF Version |  |
